Server Configuration

Feature Toggles

Automatic Recording
Automatically record all streams
Automatic ABR Transcoding
Auto-start ABR transcoding when streams go live
Max Concurrent Transcodes
Maximum streams transcoding simultaneously
Default Transcoding Profiles
Profiles assigned to new streams by default
Hotlink Protection
Enable domain-based access control

Server Information (Read-Only)

RTMP URL Template: rtmp://your-server:1935/live/{stream-key}

HLS Playback Template: https://your-server/live/{stream-key}/index.m3u8?token={token}&expires={timestamp}

Embed Player Template: <iframe src="https://your-server/embed/{stream-key}" width="640" height="360"></iframe>

Create New Stream

Enter an external HLS/TS URL to pull and restream. Leave empty for normal RTMP ingest.

Stream Created!

Use this RTMP URL in OBS or your encoder:
